Collegedunia Team

Content Curator | Updated 3+ months ago

CMC Vellore cutoff is available for Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling, NEET-SS, Tamil-Nadu-NEET-Counselling, NEET-PG here. You can check category wise CMC Vellore cutoff for popular courses such as M.D, M.S, M.Ch, Diploma, DM, MD, MBBS, DNB below.

CMC Vellore offers admission to M.D through Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling, NEET-SS. For Admission in M.S courses, CMC Vellore accept Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling score. You can check the table below to know the accepted exams for courses offered by CMC Vellore (Cutoff Range below is across all categories).

Course Exam Cutoff
M.D Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling 24 - 6183
M.S Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling 328 - 5741
M.Ch Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling 72 - 846
Diploma Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling 4723
DM NEET-SS 2 - 1596
M.Ch NEET-SS 2 - 2257
M.D NEET-SS 17 - 3398
MD NEET-SS 26
MBBS Tamil-Nadu-NEET-Counselling 288 - 5538
DNB NEET-PG 18039 - 34206

CMC Vellore Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in M.D, M.S, M.Ch, Diploma programs at CMC Vellore based on Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling score. As per CMC Vellore Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling Cutoff 2025, the overall cutoff for M.D programs in Round 1 is 24 - 6183 across all categories.

  • For M.S, The Overall closing rank in 2025 in Round 1 is 328 - 5741 across all categories.
  • For M.Ch, The Overall closing rank in 2025 in Round 1 is 72 - 846 across all categories.
  • For Diploma, The Overall closing rank in 2025 in Round 1 is 4723 across all categories.

M.D Respiratory Medicine, M.S General Surgery, M.Ch Neuro Surgery, Diploma Clinical Pathology, are the top choices for students appearing in Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling.

In 2025, M.D Respiratory Medicine closing rank for General Category is 226 in Round 1.

  • For M.S General Surgery, The Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling closing rank 2025 for General is 625 in Round 1.
  • For M.Ch Neuro Surgery, The Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling closing rank 2025 for General is 72 in Round 1.
  • For Diploma Clinical Pathology, The Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling closing rank 2025 for BC is 4723 in Round 1.

You can check M.D Respiratory Medicine, M.S General Surgery, M.Ch Neuro Surgery, Diploma Clinical Pathology, category-wise closing rank for Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling below:

CMC Vellore Tamil-Nadu-NEET-PG-Counselling Cutoff Trends

Admission at CMC Vellore in M.D Programs in 2025 was closed at 6183 rank whereas closing rank in 2024 was 8221 across all categories.

  • Admission in M.S Programs in 2025 was closed at 5741 rank whereas closing rank in 2024 was 7659 across all categories.
  • Admission in M.Ch Programs in 2025 was closed at 846 rank whereas closing rank in 2024 was 277 across all categories.
  • Admission in Diploma Programs in 2025 was closed at 4723 across all categories.

CMC Vellore NEET-SS Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in DM, M.Ch, M.D, MD programs at CMC Vellore based on NEET-SS score. As per CMC Vellore NEET-SS Cutoff 2024, the overall cutoff for DM programs in Round 2 is 2 - 1596 across all categories.

  • For M.Ch, The Overall closing rank in 2024 in Round 2 is 2 - 2257 across all categories.
  • For M.D, The Overall closing rank in 2024 in Round 2 is 17 - 3398 across all categories.
  • For MD, The Overall closing rank in 2024 in Round 2 is 26 across all categories.

DM Virology, M.Ch Hand Surgery, M.D Neuro Anaesthesiology, MD Interventional Radiology, are the top choices for students appearing in NEET-SS.

In 2024, DM Virology closing rank for General Category is 2 in Round 2.

  • For M.Ch Hand Surgery, The NEET-SS closing rank 2024 for General is 2 - 15 in Round 2.
  • For M.D Neuro Anaesthesiology, The NEET-SS closing rank 2024 for General is 17 in Round 2.
  • For MD Interventional Radiology, The NEET-SS closing rank 2024 for General is 26 in Round 2.

You can check DM Virology, M.Ch Hand Surgery, M.D Neuro Anaesthesiology, MD Interventional Radiology, category-wise closing rank for NEET-SS below:

CMC Vellore NEET-SS Cutoff Trends

Admission at CMC Vellore in DM Programs in 2024 was closed at 1596 rank whereas closing rank in 2023 was 1611 across all categories.

  • Admission in M.Ch Programs in 2024 was closed at 2257 rank whereas closing rank in 2023 was 2036 across all categories.
  • Admission in M.D Programs in 2024 was closed at 3398 rank whereas closing rank in 2023 was 2025 across all categories.
  • Admission in MD Programs in 2024 was closed at 26 rank whereas closing rank in 2023 was 12 across all categories.

Cutoff Summary: CMC Vellore

The Tamil Nadu NEET Counselling 2025 Cutoff for CMC Vellore in the General category is 288 for its M.B.B.S. program. This cutoff rank is a key factor for securing admission to the college. For the M.B.B.S. course, the closing rank for Round 1 was 288. The cutoff for the last round of admission also stood at 288.

 By Collegedunia’s Personal AI

CMC Vellore: 1 Answered Questions

What is the probable cut off marks in NEET for CMC Vellore?

Monica ChowdhuryChristian Medical College and Hospital, Vellore

I suggest you look for another college if you aren’t a Christian because it’s very tough for a Hindu to get admission at CMC Vellore. Here is the cutoff and the step-by-step admission 

  • To get admission to CMC Vellore, you need to score 50 percentile in NEET. 
  • Candidates willing to get admission into UG courses at CMC Vellore must appear in a Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by special assessments and interviews
  • The final selection will be done on the basis of the candidate's performance in this test.
  • CMC Vellore's total intake is 100 and the seat breakdown is as follows 

Overall, NEET is not the only necessary factor that is considered while selecting students for CMC Vellore. You should ace their exams and perform well in the interviews to increase your chances of admission.
